title: Player Enhancers
description: Player Enhancers add shards that enhance the player making them stronger for the sacrifice of their hotbar slot.
body:
# Player Enhancers
This datapack introduces powerful shards that boost the player's abilities but require sacrificing a valuable hotbar slot for each one equipped. A total of 3 enhancers can be equipped, one for each hotbar slot which are the seventh, eighth, and ninth slot; allowing players to maximize their abilities while sacrificing three slot. Enhancers come in four rarities—COMMON, UNCOMMON, RARE, and EPIC—each offering progressively more powerful boosts.

# The Enhancers
### 1. Desert Enhancer (COMMON)
Gives the player permanent fire resistance.
### 2. Animal Enhancer (COMMON)
Gives the player permanent strength (Lv 2).
### 3. Skull Enhancer (UNCOMMON)
Gives the player health boost (Lv 5) // 20 Hearts.
### 4. Tree Enhancer (COMMON)
Gives the player permanent invisibility.
### 5. Cactus Enhancer (UNCOMMON)
Inflicts 2 damage to any entity that harms the holder of this enhancer.
### 6. Disguise Enhancer (EPIC)
Grants the player immortality and invisibility when they remain completely still (no walking, sprinting, or jumping). These effects fade once the player moves and will reactivate after a brief period of immobility.
### 7. Wolf Enhancer (RARE)
Summons a wolf with Strength II for each entity the player kills, with a maximum of 2 wolves at a time. Wolves despawn automatically after a while, allowing new wolves to be summoned through additional kills.
### 8. Eagle Enhancer (UNCOMMON)
Gives the player 10 seconds of saturation every 8 minutes.
### 9. Ocean Enhancer (COMMON)
Gives the player permanent water breathing.
### 10. Fist Enhancer (RARE)
Grants the player Strength IV when they have an empty hand.
### 11. Illusion Enhancer (EPIC)
Saves the player from death like a Totem of Undying, granting temporary invisibility, immortality, and Speed V. However, the player can't attack during this effect, and it comes with a cooldown period.
### 12. Lamp Enhancer (COMMON) 
Gives the player permanent night vision.
[Tip: this enhancer is only good in those servers where fullbright is banned]
### 13. Magic Enhancer (RARE)  
Cobweb Immunity: Prevents the player from getting stuck in cobwebs.
### 14. Medicine Enhancer (RARE)  
Gives the player permanent regeneration (Lv 2).
### 15. Money Enhancer (UNCOMMON)  
Grants the player 12 emerald blocks after a set period of time.
### 16. Monster Enhancer (UNCOMMON)  
Deals an additional 20 hearts of damage to every non-player entity.
### 17. Nightmare Enhancer (EPIC)  
Grants the player Strength III during the night, until dawn.
### 18. Experience Enhancer (RARE) 
Grants the player 6 experience levels after a set time.
### 19. Shooter Enhancer (RARE) 
Causes all ranged weapons, including bows, crossbows, and tridents, to deal triple damage.
### 20. Compass Enhancer (COMMON) 
Illuminates nearby players for the holder of this enhancer.
### 21. Rage Enhancer (RARE) 
Increases the player's strength as their health decreases:
* 8 hearts = Strength II
* 6 hearts = Strength III
* 4 hearts = Strength IV
* 2 hearts = Strength V
* 1 heart = Strength VI
* 0.5 hearts = Strength VII
### 22. Sonic Enhancer (RARE) 
Increases the player's speed as their health decreases:
* 8 hearts = Speed II
* 6 hearts = Speed III
* 4 hearts = Speed IV
* 2 hearts = Speed V
* 1 heart = Speed VI
* 0.5 hearts = Speed VII
### 23. Rocket Enhancer (RARE) 
Gives the player permanent speed (Lv 3).
### 24. Spider Enhancer (EPIC) 
The holder of this enhancer can inflict the Wither effect on any entity they damage for a limited duration.
### 25. Vampire Enhancer (EPIC) 
For every 3 hits the player lands, they heal a portion of their health.
### More enhancers coming soon! Feel free to leave a suggestion on our issue page below, and your proposed enhancer might be added to our list (You will get credit too)!

# Rarity of Enhancer
### COMMON: 15% to drop. (1 in 7)
### UNCOMMON: 6.14% to drop. (1 in 16)
### RARE: 2.57% to drop. (1 in 39)
### EPIC: 0.79% to drop. (1 in 127)

# How to get Enhancer?
The enhancers are incredibly powerful, making them useful for PvPers, builders, grinders, and all types of Minecraft players.
Enhancers are challenging to obtain, as they only drop from hostile monsters with over 20 hearts of health and are unfarmable in the current version.
The enhancers drop from the following mobs:
* Elder Guardian
* Ender Dragon
* Evoker
* Piglin Brute
* Ravager

# Author Note
**Issue Page:** [Click me](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/player-enhancers/)

If you encounter any bugs, glitches, or anything that doesn't work as expected, please report it on our issue page linked above. You'll receive credit for discovering the bug! Additionally, feel free to leave any suggestions, and you'll be credited if your suggestion is approved.

*Thank you for downloading this datapack! Peace be upon you!*
